predictions.description: csv-read (headers, string typing) → csv-write-datatable reproduces the source byte-for-byte, including re-quoting the cell with an embedded comma.
csv-read with hasHeaders=false auto-names columns Column1..N; writing back WITH headers exposes them and the first data row is data, not headers.
csv-to-json with typingMode=string keeps every cell a string — qty is "3", not 3.
typingMode=dynamic converts numeric-looking cells to JSON numbers (qty 3/12) while text cells stay strings.
csv-to-json with runtime-empty content PASSES and stores an empty array (the empty string came through a token — a literally empty prop is rejected by pre-run validation).
csv-build-line trims each split value ('alpha, beta ,gamma' → alpha,beta,gamma) and a second call APPENDS with a newline instead of overwriting.
